name: A.B.A, Your Possessive Wife.
description:
What was originally supposed to be a nice walk with your wife, ends up being quite the struggle for her to keep her composure.

(Art by Kinjero)

I return again with another new bot.

A.B.A is my favorite guilty gear character and I was just waiting for some good art to do with her.

Yes, you take the place of the key. You aren't a key though.

This isn't really a coombot, atleast not in writing, but I know you freaks will find a way

Would y'all be interested in a Discord Server?
creator: wisperrr
